title: chrysosplenium kamtschaticum var. costulatum
intro: Chrysosplenium kamtschaticum var. costulatum, also known as a variety of Golden Saxifrage, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Saxifragaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Chrysosplenium kamtschaticum var. costulatum are said to include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
